title: Senior Backend Engineer
description: Apilex is a global legaltech company building AI that transforms how legal professionals work. Powered by a proprietary database of 200M+ court decisions and legal documents, our platform delivers semantic search, contract analysis, and automated legal drafting — turning days of legal research into seconds. Since our founding, we've grown to a team of 90+ people and established ourselves as Türkiye's leading AI legal assistant. Now, we're taking it global — expanding into France, Germany, Brasil, Italy and Spain to compete in the billion-dollar legaltech market. What sets us apart? We don't use off-the-shelf AI. We build domain-specific, closed-circuit AI models with multi-layered verification systems that eliminate hallucinations and deliver answers backed by real citations and legal reasoning. Every feature we ship changes how lawyers work, not in theory, but in practice. We are hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to design and scale the high-traffic microservices that form the backbone of our global legal AI platform. Key Responsibilities Scalable Architecture: Design and develop high-traffic, scalable microservice architectures to support our expanding global footprint. Code Excellence: Raise the bar on code quality by leading code review processes and implementing best practices across the backend. Technical Leadership: Provide mentorship to the engineering team and guide technical decision-making for complex features. System Integration: Build and maintain reliable integrations between core services, AI agents, and large-scale data stores. Performance Optimization: Ensure system reliability and low latency across distributed services through efficient caching and messaging strategies. What We’re Looking For 5+ years of backend experience building and scaling Java and Spring Boot applications in production Strong foundation in software architecture design including OOP and SOLID principles across various scales Hands-on experience with both PostgreSQL and MongoDB including the ability to design hybrid data architectures Deep knowledge of Elasticsearch or similar technologies for high-performance search and indexing Practical experience with messaging systems like RabbitMQ or Kafka and in-memory caching with Redis Solid understanding of WebSocket and real-time streaming architectures for distributed environments Direct experience with cloud platforms and building automated CI/CD pipelines Ability to ship high-quality code and iterate quickly rather than waiting for perfect conditions Why join us? We're building the AI that lawyers rely on every day, across every area of their practice — the core of how thousands of legal professionals research, draft, and reason. You'll join a team solving one of the hardest challenges in AI: making it reliable enough for high-stakes, real-world decisions. We're scaling across Europe and Latin America, shipping fast, and setting the bar for what reliable AI looks like in legal. Whatever your role, your work here will be visible and meaningful. We're one of the fastest-growing AI companies in Türkiye, and we're looking for ambitious people who want to build the future of legal technology on a global stage. This is Apilex. AI for Legal. Join us.

title: Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation based in Turkey. This role offers the opportunity to build and improve the core backend systems powering next-generation business process automation. The Software Engineer will work on distributed workflow technologies that support critical enterprise operations at global scale. You will contribute to event-driven architectures, API design, process orchestration, and high-performance backend solutions. The position combines backend engineering, distributed systems, data consistency, scalability, and product-focused development. You will collaborate with a remote-first team of experienced engineers while solving complex technical challenges with real-world impact. This opportunity is ideal for an ambitious backend engineer who enjoys ownership, continuous learning, and building reliable systems used by thousands of organizations. Accountabilities The Software Engineer, Backend - Core/API & Process Automation is responsible for designing, developing, and improving backend systems that enable reliable workflow execution and enterprise automation. This role requires strong engineering fundamentals, product thinking, and the ability to contribute to complex distributed systems in a collaborative environment. Build and evolve backend features within event-sourced workflow engines and APIs supporting enterprise process automation. Develop, test, and deliver high-quality software while contributing to technical designs and architecture decisions. Design and maintain clean, reliable APIs with strong attention to developer experience, scalability, and backward compatibility. Work on distributed systems challenges involving event sourcing, command/event architectures, CQRS patterns, concurrency, ordering, and system reliability. Improve application performance by identifying inefficient processing patterns and optimizing data access across different storage technologies. Build and enhance observability capabilities through logging, metrics, tracing, and monitoring practices. Contribute to innovative automation features, including capabilities that enable intelligent agents to interact with business processes. Maintain high engineering standards through code reviews, testing, documentation, and continuous improvement initiatives. Identify technical debt and proactively recommend solutions to improve system quality and maintainability. Participate in production support activities and on-call responsibilities as experience grows. Collaborate effectively within a distributed, asynchronous engineering environment. Requirements The ideal candidate has professional backend engineering experience and a strong interest in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and scalable software development. Success in this role requires technical curiosity, ownership, clear communication, and the ability to solve complex problems independently. 2+ years of professional backend engineering experience. Strong understanding of backend development principles and software engineering best practices. Experience or strong interest in event-driven systems and distributed architectures. Understanding of concepts such as consistency, ordering, failure handling, and event sourcing fundamentals. Good API design skills, including creating clean REST interfaces and maintaining backward compatibility. Product-oriented mindset with a focus on delivering meaningful user outcomes. Ability to independently manage priorities, drive projects forward, and communicate progress effectively in a remote environment. Strong written communication skills for asynchronous collaboration. High motivation to learn, grow, and take on challenging technical problems. Experience with workflow automation, process orchestration, BPMN, or similar technologies is considered an asset. Familiarity with Elasticsearch/OpenSearch, relational databases such as PostgreSQL, and query optimization is preferred. Knowledge of observability practices, including logging, metrics, and tracing, is a plus. Working knowledge of JVM technologies is an advantage. Benefits Competitive compensation package based on location, experience, and qualifications. Fully remote work environment with flexibility to work from anywhere in India. Home office budget and support for creating an effective remote workspace. Flexible time off policies to support personal wellbeing and work-life balance. Opportunities to participate in team events, global gatherings, and community activities. Comprehensive wellbeing support, including healthcare resources and mental health programs. Lifestyle benefits designed to support fitness, family needs, personal interests, and financial wellbeing. Retirement and insurance benefits where applicable. Annual learning and development budget for courses, certifications, books, and professional growth. Opportunity to work on impactful technology used by global organizations. High-autonomy environment with significant ownership and career growth opportunities. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
